name: companion
identity: A broad-shouldered figure accompanying the player character's captors, acting as one of the guards escorting the player through the woods.
current_status: Walking to the left of the player character, narrowing his eyes at the player's attempt to speak, and exchanging a terse word with his spear-wielding companion.

volatile_state.current_activity: walking with the player character and exchanging words with a companion

notes: Identity of this companion and the other captor remains unknown.
